title: Gmail trigger not firing automatically in workflow
symptom: The workflow is marked as active, but the Gmail trigger does not activate automatically despite receiving emails. Manual execution works fine.
not_this_if: Manual execution of the workflow works without issues
root_cause: Gmail triggers can stop firing automatically due to various reasons such as filters applied, rate limits imposed by Google, or expired OAuth tokens. Even if the workflow is active, these factors can prevent the trigger from functioning as expected.
fix_steps: Increase the polling interval for the trigger
Check logs or enable debug mode for more insights
Ensure Gmail API and OAuth settings are valid
agent_instruction: Re-authenticate your Gmail credentials and increase the polling interval for the trigger.
